title: Afternoon Nap Loungewear Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Afternoon Nap Loungewear Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic afternoon nap loungewear editorial portrait for adult woman with soft mature features and loose chestnut hair. Subject: adult woman with soft mature features and loose chestnut hair wears champagne satin slip under a long cream knit robe, fully covered editorial styling and rests in seated sideways on a linen window bench with eyes closed and one hand resting on robe belt, with closed eyes, relaxed expression, natural body posture, and quiet adult elegance. Scene: quiet hotel room window bench with folded blanket, linen curtain, and made bed in background creates a clean airy bedroom or lounge setting with soft bedding, pillows, curtains, gentle wrinkles, and intimate natural shadows. Composition: Vertical 9:16 lifestyle editorial portrait with the subject resting near window light, not looking at camera, natural unposed posture, soft negative space, and product-visible loungewear fabric detail. Signature Elements: Closed eyes, calm nap expression, modest loungewear fabric texture, soft bedding near window, natural relaxed pose, realistic skin and hair detail, quiet feminine lifestyle atmosphere, and clean bedroom editorial restraint. Fixed source details: Color Story: champagne, cream, beige, warm gold. Style: Ultra-realistic loungewear editorial photography with realistic skin texture, natural pores, soft hair strands, shallow depth of field, real lens perspective, soft focus falloff, and quiet lifestyle intimacy. Color Palette: Theme: afternoon nap loungewear portrait Fabric / outfit: black, white, dark silver, and restrained red accent palette Mood: quiet, soft, elegant, romantic, clean, slightly dreamy Bedroom style: black, white, dark guides the fixed soft high-key color story, with natural skin tones, gentle fabric highlights, airy bedding, and restrained bedroom neutrals. Lighting: Soft afternoon window light or warm creamy natural light, high-key but not overexposed, gentle shadows, preserved fabric texture, and soft skin detail. Camera: Vertical 9:16 editorial portrait crop, shallow depth of field, real lens perspective, and soft focus falloff across bedding and background. Restrictions: Keep the subject clearly adult, modest, natural, relaxed, non-vulgar, and not looking at camera;
